heroHeadline: Day 31 of Iran War: Isfahan Strikes Continue; Trump Claims 'Great Progress' in Talks; Iran Denies Direct Contact; SCOTUS Strikes Conversion Therapy Ban 8-1; Palm Beach Airport Renamed for Trump
heroSubtitle: US-Israel strikes hit Isfahan for a second straight day as the war enters its 31st day; Trump claims progress with Iran via intermediaries but Tehran flatly denies any direct negotiations and holds firm on 5-point counterproposal; April 6 energy-strike deadline stands. Supreme Court rules 8-1 in Chiles v. Salazar that Colorado's conversion therapy ban violates free speech. Florida renames Palm Beach airport for Trump pending FAA approval. JOLTS data shows 6.946M job openings in January — above forecast — as markets brace for March payrolls report on Good Friday April 3.
footerNote: Data sourced from White House, executive orders, court records, Reuters, AP, CBO, USTR, Pentagon, IEA, BLS, Foreign Policy, Washington Post, NBC News. Economic data from BLS, BEA, Treasury, Goldman Sachs, Federal Reserve, OECD.
